blockers.description: combatActive exposure mechanism not yet decided — getter function, callback, or module-level variable
blockers.workaround: Decide at start of Phase 7 before writing close handler

decisions.decision: Combat moves to modal overlay triggered by Start Battle button
decisions.rationale: User prefers modal over inline panel
Already mobile-tested; no new libraries needed

decisions.decision: New ui/battleModal.js module for modal lifecycle; battle.js refactored to container-scoped API
Slide-up open animation, fade-out close, respects prefers-reduced-motion
Battle history log stays on sheet; refreshed after modal closes

next_action: Run /gsd:plan-phase 6 to create the Phase 6 execution plan
context_notes: Milestone v1.1 was fully initialized this session. Research, requirements (MODAL-01 through MODAL-12), and roadmap (Phases 6-8) are all committed. No code has been touched yet. Phase 6 is the foundation — scope battle.js to container, create battleModal.js skeleton, wire Start Battle trigger.
